---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Loom

labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

What are you trying to do that Loom makes hard or impossible today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. Sketches, examples, or rough UI ideas welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why they fall short.

## Scope check

<!--
Loom is pre-1.0 — see the Implementation Status in CLAUDE.md. Noting how this
fits the local-first, two-tier-agent design helps it land well.
-->

## Anything else

Other context, links, or prior art.
